# OpenTycoonOS

OpenTycoonOS is a TypeScript package of composable simulation primitives for tycoon and management games.

Package name: `opentycoonos`
Repository: `https://github.com/sidharthrath/OpenTycoonOS`
Primary language: TypeScript
Runtime dependencies: none for the core package

## Best Files For LLMs And Coding Agents

- `README.md`: public overview, install, quick example.
- `AGENTS.md`: coding-agent instructions.
- `docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md`: game-building flow and module selection.
- `docs/module-catalog.json`: machine-readable catalog of modules, import paths, and docs.
- `ARCHITECTURE.md`: conceptual architecture.
- `ROADMAP.md`: module maturity and intended direction.
- `GAMES.md`: examples of game genres and module compositions.
- `src/*/README.md`: module-level usage notes.

## Common Tasks

- Build a new tycoon game: read `docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md`, select modules from `docs/module-catalog.json`, then compose a game-specific state and tick loop.
- Add a reusable primitive: add code under `src/<module>/`, export it through `src/index.ts` and `package.json`, document it in the module README, and update `CHANGELOG.md`.
- Validate changes: run `npm run build`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test`.

## Useful Import Families

- `opentycoonos/tick`
- `opentycoonos/clock`
- `opentycoonos/financial`
- `opentycoonos/accounting`
- `opentycoonos/customer-funnel`
- `opentycoonos/market-engine`
- `opentycoonos/market-topology/segmented`
- `opentycoonos/market-topology/geographic`
- `opentycoonos/market-topology/network`
- `opentycoonos/revenue-models/subscription`
- `opentycoonos/revenue-models/transaction`
- `opentycoonos/asset-models/fleet`
- `opentycoonos/competition`
- `opentycoonos/sim-harness`
